## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org)
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run typecheck` pass
- [ ] `npm test` passes (and I added tests where it makes sense)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] If I changed the dataset: `npm run validate:data` passes and every new/changed
      question includes a **citation** to a verifiable source
- [ ] I updated documentation where relevant
